name: Clam Sauce (Red)
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Minced, chopped or whole clams
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté until golden brown.
3. Stir in all other ingredients except the clams.
4. Simmer for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Gently add the clams.
7. Serve over cooked spaghetti.
